title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 475.300 - Order for payment to protectee of amount due
text:
475.300.  Order for payment to protectee of amount due. — The court shall order payment of the amount found to be due, and the rendition of any effects, property, rights or credits belonging to the protectee, to the protectee, or to the successor of the conservator, or to the personal representative of the protectee, or other person designated by the court, as the case may be, and enforce the order by attachment or execution against the conservator and his sureties.
(RSMo 1939 § 431, A.L. 1955 p. 385 § 341, A.L. 1983 S.B. 44 & 45) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 432; 1919 § 428; 1909 § 458
